primarySource.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
primarySource.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

sources.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
sources.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

sources.label: Vegas Regional Qualifier summary page
sources.description: Community summary page used to recover structured legend rows and fallback deck slugs.

eventPrimarySource.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
eventPrimarySource.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

decklistSource.label: Yasuo official best-of decklist
decklistSource.description: Decklist parsed directly from the official Riot/Riftbound event recap.

resolvedCard.name: Irelia - Fervent
resolvedCard.effect:
[Deflect] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)
When you choose or ready me, give me +1 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Lonely Poro
resolvedCard.effect: [Deathknell] — If I died alone, draw 1. (When I die, get the effect. I'm alone if there are no other friendly units here.)

resolvedCard.name: Stellacorn Herder
resolvedCard.effect: When I move, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Teemo - Scout
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
When you play me, give me +3 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Vex - Cheerless
resolvedCard.effect: While I'm in combat, friendly spells cost :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_rainbow: less to a minimum of :rb_energy_1:, and enemy spells cost :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_rainbow: more.

resolvedCard.name: Defy
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell that costs no more than :rb_energy_4: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow:.

resolvedCard.name: Discipline
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit +2 :rb_might: this turn. Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: En Garde
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a friendly unit +1 :rb_might: this turn, then an additional +1 :rb_might: this turn if it is the only unit you control there.

resolvedCard.name: Fight or Flight
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a unit from a battlefield to its base.

resolvedCard.name: Flash
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Move up to 2 friendly units to base.

resolvedCard.name: Last Breath
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Ready a friendly unit. It deals damage equal to its Might to an enemy unit at a battlefield.

resolvedCard.name: Not So Fast
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter an enemy spell or ability that chooses a friendly unit or gear.

resolvedCard.name: Rebuke
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Ride the Wind
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a friendly unit and ready it.

resolvedCard.name: Stacked Deck
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

resolvedCard.name: Boots of Swiftness
resolvedCard.effect: [Equip] :rb_rune_chaos: (:rb_rune_chaos:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Edge of Night
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
When you play this from face down, attach it to a unit you control (here).
[Equip] :rb_rune_chaos: (:rb_rune_chaos:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Guardian Angel
resolvedCard.effect: [Equip] :rb_rune_calm: (:rb_rune_calm:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Mask of Foresight
resolvedCard.effect: When a friendly unit attacks or defends alone, give it +1 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Zhonya's Hourglass
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
If a friendly unit would die, kill this instead. Heal that unit, exhaust it, and recall it. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)

resolvedCard.name: Back-Alley Bar
resolvedCard.effect: When a unit moves from here, give it +1 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Obelisk of Power
resolvedCard.effect: At the start of each player's first Beginning Phase, that player channels 1 rune.

resolvedCard.name: The Dreaming Tree
resolvedCard.effect: When a player chooses a friendly unit here with a spell for the first time each turn, they draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Adaptatron
resolvedCard.effect: When I conquer, you may kill a gear. If you do, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

resolvedCard.name: Hard Bargain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays :rb_energy_2:.

resolvedCard.name: Not So Fast
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter an enemy spell or ability that chooses a friendly unit or gear.

resolvedCard.name: Sneaky Deckhand
resolvedCard.effect: You may play me to an open battlefield.

resolvedCard.name: Vex - Cheerless
resolvedCard.effect: While I'm in combat, friendly spells cost :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_rainbow: less to a minimum of :rb_energy_1:, and enemy spells cost :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_rainbow: more.
